name: AWS ECR Image Metadata Retrieval Request Detected After Successful Login
description: This model detects the retrieval of metadata of container images from Amazon Elastic Container Registry (ECR) following a successful login. This alert signifies authorized access to container images for deployment or other legitimate purposes. However, it also highlights the potential for misuse or unauthorized access if the activity is not initiated by authorized users or accounts.

rules.name: AWS ECR Authorization Token Request Detected
AWS ECR Successful Image Metadata Retrieval Request Detected

author: Srivathsa H S and Sunil Bharti
